cases.pattern_name: Shared infrastructure brushing and subsidy skimming
cases.assertion: AER-001 detects new-account subsidy skimming: shared devices/IPs/payment accounts, fast refunds, low-quality logistics, and weak normal-business counter explanations.
AER-002 detects reputation manipulation: repeated micro-orders, duplicate review text/images, automation signals, shared infrastructure, and merchant-level rating inflation.

cases.pattern_name: Promotion subsidy arbitrage and refund extraction
cases.assertion: AER-003 detects subsidy arbitrage: concentrated eligibility keys and payment accounts repeatedly extract high discounts with abnormal refund/logistics patterns.

observations.summary: Expanded entity-resolution graph across account, device, IP, payment, logistics, and evidence nodes.

support_evidence.description: 14 users and 80 orders share 3 devices; reuse ratio 26.7.
80 orders concentrate on 2 datacenter/proxy IP addresses.

nodes.label: EC-SKIM-001
nodes.text: AER-001 detects new-account subsidy skimming: shared devices/IPs/payment accounts, fast refunds, low-quality logistics, and weak normal-business counter explanations.

observations.summary: Refund cluster query compared case refunds with dynamic promotion cohort baseline.

support_evidence.description: 61 of 80 orders were refunded; lift is 12.7x cohort baseline and 37 refunds occurred within 24h.

observations.summary: Dynamic cohort comparison tested whether Black Friday traffic explains the anomaly.

support_evidence.description: Case composite promo risk 0.64 is 4.7x the matched category/promo cohort baseline 0.14.

observations.summary: Logistics trace query assessed shipment authenticity and possible warehouse-batch counter explanations.

support_evidence.description: 80 logistics records have low cost/low trace quality and 80 auto-confirm receipts.

observations.summary: Payment cluster query found concentrated payment instruments across supposedly independent buyers.

support_evidence.description: 80 payments collapse to 4 payment accounts; top account appears 20 times.

observations.summary: Subsidy ledger query linked promotion rules, eligibility keys, and repeated subsidy extraction.

support_evidence.description: 80 subsidy claims total 1440.00; repeated eligibility keys=6 and average subsidy=18.00.

observations.summary: Behavior-sequence analysis fused uploaded gateway logs, device logs, and review content similarity.

support_evidence.description: Uploaded device/gateway logs show average automation score 0.85 across 80 device events.
80 comments include 160 duplicate text/image reuse hits.

observations.summary: Counter-evidence search tested normal-business explanations before passport emission.

counter_evidence.description: No strong old-customer, campus, household, organic campaign, or warehouse-batch counter-evidence was found.

passport.risk_assertion: AER-001 detects new-account subsidy skimming: shared devices/IPs/payment accounts, fast refunds, low-quality logistics, and weak normal-business counter explanations.

support_evidence.description: Uploaded device/gateway logs show average automation score 0.85 across 80 device events.
Case composite promo risk 0.64 is 4.7x the matched category/promo cohort baseline 0.14.
14 users and 80 orders share 3 devices; reuse ratio 26.7.
80 orders concentrate on 2 datacenter/proxy IP addresses.
80 logistics records have low cost/low trace quality and 80 auto-confirm receipts.
80 payments collapse to 4 payment accounts; top account appears 20 times.
80 comments include 160 duplicate text/image reuse hits.
61 of 80 orders were refunded; lift is 12.7x cohort baseline and 37 refunds occurred within 24h.
80 subsidy claims total 1440.00; repeated eligibility keys=6 and average subsidy=18.00.

counter_evidence.description: No strong old-customer, campus, household, organic campaign, or warehouse-batch counter-evidence was found.

remaining_uncertainty: Payment account ownership still requires review.
Warehouse batch shipping is only partially ruled out.

human_gate.reason: Evidence quality and disposition require auditor review.

passport.model_narrative: The case has multi-source support evidence and limited counter-evidence. Human review is required before disposition.

observations.summary: Case memory retrieval compared current evidence against approved historical pattern trajectories.

support_evidence.description: Historical memory 'Review farm with verified micro orders' matches this case pattern: Prior reputation manipulation case: low-value orders, duplicate review images, high automation score, and few refunds.
